ops.insert:
I'm replacing the "plain" text with a quilljs based rich text editor.  I have the export to LaTeX working, it's not pixel perfect, but its very close.  Only supports bold, italics and indent right now.

So.. I still need to export to .xml to create the paragraph/phrase/image skeleton the rest of the system expects.  I already have tight segments for phrases (for highlighting) and looser markers for images approximately every N words.  Gonna be awesome.
